footer: Bible Reading Challenge · Encourage one another in daily reading

home.title: Bible Challenge
home.heroDesc: Stay consistent with your group. Log passages and reflections, track weekly progress, and fair group rankings.
home.fourGroupsDesc: Pick a weekly goal at signup. Group scores use average completion rate so every group competes fairly.

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.userExists: Username or email already in use
errors.reflectionLength: Reflection must be 500 characters or less
errors.alreadyCheckedIn: You have already checked in today
errors.notFoundMsg: The page you requested does not exist.
errors.forbiddenMsg: This page is for administrators only.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.checkinSuccess: Check-in saved! May God's word bless you today.

season.notActive: Challenge season is not active. Check-in is closed.
season.monthlyRanking: Leaderboard uses challenge months; you still meet weekly goals.

checkin.title: Check-in
checkin.alreadyDone: You already checked in today. See you tomorrow!

leaderboard.title: Group leaderboard
leaderboard.desc: Compared by challenge month: Jun 6/1–6/28, Jul 6/29–8/2, Aug 8/3–8/30. Weekly goals still apply; monthly score = average of weekly completion rates.

community.title: Today's reflections
community.desc: Read what others shared today and encourage one another.
community.empty: No reflections yet today. Check in and share yours!

profile.title: Profile
profile.changeGroupDesc: Once per challenge month you may switch groups (your weekly goal changes).
profile.changeGroupErrorAlready: You already changed groups this period.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Bible Challenge
onboarding.subtitle: A quick guide to get started
onboarding.step1Desc: Tap Check-in at the bottom, enter today's passage and reflection, then submit once per day.
onboarding.step2Desc: Go to Profile → Settings (everyone) for language and light/dark mode. Admins have a separate panel there.
onboarding.step3Desc: Open Feed to read others' reflections today and give likes (sorted by likes by default).
onboarding.step4Desc: Leaderboard uses challenge months (Jun/Aug periods). Weekly goals still apply. Change group once per period in Profile.

settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Personal app settings — language and appearance. Available to every signed-in user.
settings.languageDesc: Choose your interface language. Saved to your account.
settings.adminSectionDesc: The following is only for admin accounts.

admin.allCheckedIn: Everyone in this group checked in this week ✓
